india_trends.title: Dynacons Systems share price jumps 18% after RBI order worth ₹750.82 crore
india_trends.summary: Dynacons Systems shares rose 18% on 5 May after securing a ₹750.82 crore order from the RBI for a private cloud infrastructure project. The contract spans five years, involving design, implementation, and ongoing support for a new data centre in Odisha.

india_trends.title: Amba Auto Sales share price makes flat debut, lists at ₹134.50 on NSE SME
india_trends.summary: Amba Auto Sales share price made flat debut in the Indian stock market on Tuesday, 5 May. The stock listed at ₹134.50 on NSE SME, as compared to the IPO price of ₹135.

india_trends.title: L&T bags 'large' BCGCL order for coal-to-chemicals plant in Odisha, 2,000 TPD capacity
india_trends.summary: Larsen & Toubro has secured a landmark deal to develop a state-of-the-art coal-to-ammonium nitrate facility in Odisha, poised to deliver 2,000 tonnes of ammonium nitrate daily. india_trends.title: Sobha share price rallies 9.5% after strong Q4 as profit doubles, sales hit record levels
india_trends.summary: Sobha Ltd shares rose 9.5% after reporting a 124% increase in Q4 net profit to ₹91.83 crore, with revenue up 60.2% to ₹1,908 crore. The company also announced a ₹6 dividend and record sales bookings of ₹8,136 crore for FY26.

india_trends.title: India's retail car sales hit record in April, but Mideast crisis clouds outlook
india_trends.summary: Indian car sales reached an all-time high in April. Passenger vehicle sales saw a significant jump. This growth was driven by rate cuts, easier financing, and strong demand from rural areas. However, concerns about Middle East tensions and rising fuel prices may affect demand in the coming months. india_trends.title: US Stock Market: US equity fund inflows hit six-week low amid oil price surge and rate uncertainty
india_trends.summary: Investor demand for US equities weakened, with fund inflows falling to a six-week low of $911 million. Rising oil prices and uncertainty around interest rates, especially ahead of the Federal Reserve policy decision, dampened risk appetite and made investors more cautious.

india_trends.summary: The Tata Group stock opened at ₹602.05 per share today, as compared to previous close of ₹591.05 on Monday. Here's Q4 results snapshot, along with its share price trend.

india_trends.title: Gold rises marginally, silver opens flat as traders assess Iran war peace talks. Key levels to watch today
india_trends.summary: Gold and silver prices remained largely flat on MCX as investors tracked U.S.-Iran tensions and inflation risks. Elevated crude oil prices and global uncertainty kept markets volatile. Analysts expect range-bound movement with key support and resistance levels in focus ahead of U.S. macro data and f

india_trends.title: Tata Tech shares soar over 7% after Q4 results, but Motilal Oswal sees 15% downside; here’s why
india_trends.summary: Tata Technologies shares surged following strong March quarter results. The company reported a net profit of Rs 204 crore, an 8% increase from the previous year. Revenue also saw a significant jump of 22%. This performance has boosted investor confidence. Experts remain watchful of future execution

india_trends.title: Multibagger drone stock ideaForge Technology share price jumps 8% to 52-week high on strong Q4 results
india_trends.summary: ideaForge Technology shares surged over 8% to a 52-week high of ₹794.40 after reporting a net profit of ₹60 crore for March, a significant turnaround from last year's loss. Revenue rose over 600%, driving strong investor confidence and a six-session rally.

india_trends.title: Ambuja Cements shares drop over 2% after Q4 results. What Jefferies and Nomura are saying
india_trends.summary: Ambuja Cements shares fell despite strong Q4 results, where net profit jumped 78% year-on-year to Rs 1,830 crore and revenue rose 10% to Rs 10,892 crore. Profit also surged sharply on a sequential basis, but the stock declined, suggesting muted market reaction despite robust earnings.
